title: Explain the main TAAC training entry point
objective: Identify the main training entry point, trainer loop, and model definition in the TAAC workspace.
success_criteria: Names the main training file or main function
Names the trainer loop or trainer class
Names the core model file or model class
constraints: Prefer structural explanation over long paraphrase
hints: Look for train.py, trainer.py, model.py, main(), and the model class.
